raw_title: A Way Out or Another Hurdle? Assessing the Impact of the “News Partnership Evaluation Committee” on Platform Dependence in South Korea
title_en: A Way Out or Another Hurdle? Assessing the Impact of the “News Partnership Evaluation Committee” on Platform Dependence in South Korea
title_zh: 出路还是另一道障碍？评估“新闻合作评估委员会”对韩国平台依赖的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了韩国设立的“新闻合作评估委员会”如何影响新闻媒体对数字平台的依赖。它分析了这个委员会是帮助新闻机构减少对平台的依赖，还是反而增加了新的障碍。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how South Korea's 'News Partnership Evaluation Committee' affects news media's dependence on digital platforms. It analyzes whether this committee helps news organizations reduce platform reliance or creates additional hurdles.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻生态系统中政策干预对媒体独立性和平台依赖的影响，特别关注韩国等东亚国家的监管框架。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of policy interventions on media independence and platform dependence in digital journalism ecosystems, with particular focus on regulatory frameworks in East Asian countries like South Korea.
